name: Comdata Fleet Card & Payments API
what_it_does: Comdata REST API for fleet card, trucking payments, and corporate payment platform (subsidiary of Fleetcor Technologies). Enables AI agents to manage fleet card issuance and controls, handle fuel and maintenance transaction tracking, access over-the-road (OTR) trucking payment workflows, retrieve IFTA fuel tax reporting data, manage driver cash advance and settlement transactions, handle corporate card expense management, access fleet analytics and spend reporting, manage merchant acceptance and authorization, and integrate fleet card data with TMS and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing fleet card transactions and fuel spending from trucking fleet automation agents
Accessing IFTA fuel tax reporting from compliance automation agents
Handling driver cash advance and settlement from trucking operations agents
Integrating fleet card data with TMS and accounting from financial automation agents
not_for: Consumer credit cards without fleet and trucking payments focus
Non-fleet businesses without OTR trucking and fuel management needs
Simple expense management without fleet card and driver settlement
best_when: A trucking company, fleet operator, or logistics firm using Comdata fleet cards wants AI agents to automate fleet card management, fuel transaction tracking, driver settlements, IFTA reporting, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Fleet card transactions are real payment card transactions — PCI-DSS scope. OTR driver cash advances are financial instruments requiring fraud controls. IFTA fuel tax automation must accurately calculate tax liability by state. Driver financial data is sensitive.

auth.notes: Comdata uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with fleet, payments, and trucking scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for transaction events. Fleetcor subsidiary with global fleet card platform. Strong trucking and OTR payment specialization.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — fleet card and payment transaction pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based and program fees; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Brentwood, Tennessee. Subsidiary of Fleetcor Technologies (NYSE: FLT). Founded 1969. Major OTR trucking and fleet card platform. 1M+ cards in circulation. Specializes in over-the-road trucking payments including fuel, maintenance, and driver cash. Competes with WEX and Voyager for fleet cards.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Fleet card and driver cash advance transactions are real payment instruments — PCI-DSS scope
IFTA fuel tax automation must accurately calculate by state — errors create tax liability
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
OTR driver settlement automation must handle real-time approval workflows
Fleet card fraud controls — automated limit changes must prevent misuse
Fleetcor parent platform may have overlapping APIs — verify Comdata-specific endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet card payment and trucking transaction data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Driver financial data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet payment and OTR trucking data. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Driver cash advance sensitivity.
